name: Mercury Daily Reconciliation
description: Scheduled n8n workflow: calls Mercury API (acct 1419) every 24 hours, parses balances and transactions, appends reconciliation entries to DAILY_LEDGER.json in the repo, and notifies Aurelius via Telegram on significant burn or low Empire Fund.

nodes.name: Normalize & Split
nodes.config: // Parse transactions, calculate per-transaction $4 split and produce ledger entries

notes: This is a scaffold. n8n credentials for Mercury & GitHub must be bound in the n8n instance. The workflow performs idempotent reconciliation by checking existing DAILY_LEDGER transactions and only appending new items. It will create alert nodes to message Telegram Chat ID 6683959510 if Empire Fund < monthly survival threshold.
